errors.unknown: Unknown error, please try again later
errors.networkError: Network error, please check your connection

pwa.bannerBodyChromium: Add to your home screen for quick access and a more app-like experience.
pwa.bannerBodyIos: In Safari: tap Share → scroll to “Add to Home Screen” → Add.
pwa.bannerBodyAndroidOther: Open the browser menu (⋮), then choose “Install app”, “Add to Home screen”, or “Add to Home” (wording varies by browser). In Samsung Internet you can also use “Add page to” → “Home screen”.
